pi_items.source: setup_data.py line 189 explicitly creates event with this name

Odoo calendar.event model uses 'confidential' for 'Only Internal Users' (verified via GitHub sources and setup_task.sh line 62 comment mapping); task description states target is 'Only Internal Users'
Odoo calendar.event model uses 'free' for 'Free' availability (verified via web search); task description states target is 'Free'
setup_task.sh line 66 explicitly sets privacy='public' as reset state; line 62 comment confirms 'public=Everyone'
setup_task.sh line 67 explicitly sets show_as='busy' as reset state; line 63 comment confirms 'busy=Busy'

privileged_info_summary: The task targets the 'Investor Update Preparation' calendar event in Odoo, which is created with initial settings of privacy='public' (Everyone) and show_as='busy' (Busy). The task requires changing these to privacy='confidential' (Only Internal Users) and show_as='free' (Free). The event includes attendees Alice Johnson, Henry Kim, and Grace Patel, and is scheduled for week 2 in the Board Room. All metadata claims match the actual configuration in the setup scripts and Odoo's calendar event field definitions.
